## Roadmap version
<!-- Which version does this belong to? See AGENTS.md for the full roadmap. -->
- [ ] v0.1 — Trustworthy (security + survivability)
- [ ] v0.2 — Differentiated (presence primitives)
- [ ] v0.3 — Adopted (developer onboarding)
- [ ] v0.5 — Observable (durable messaging + observability)
- [ ] v1.0 — Platform (ecosystem + resilience)
- [ ] Not on roadmap yet

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? What's missing today?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context
Links, prior art, or examples from other projects that illustrate what you're going for.
